steps.data:
<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Gutenberg Demo Lockdown
 * Description: Hides irrelevant admin menus and restricts navigation for the block editor demo.
 */

// Remove all top-level admin menu items except Pages
add_action( 'admin_menu', function() {
    global $menu;
    $keep = [ 'edit.php?post_type=page' ];
    foreach ( $menu as $key => $item ) {
        if ( ! empty( $item[2] ) && ! in_array( $item[2], $keep, true ) ) {
            remove_menu_page( $item[2] );
        }
    }
    global $submenu;
    $submenu = [];
}, 999 );

// Hide the admin toolbar on the front-end
add_filter( 'show_admin_bar', '__return_false' );

// Redirect any wp-admin page that isn't the block editor or Pages list back to the page list
add_action( 'current_screen', function( $screen ) {
    $allowed_bases = [ 'edit', 'post' ];
    if ( ! in_array( $screen->base, $allowed_bases, true ) ) {
        wp_safe_redirect( admin_url( 'edit.php?post_type=page' ) );
        exit;
    }
} );
